title: Umami Gooey Romantic Slovakian Tomato Stir-fry
description: This dairy-free dish combines garam masala with a blend of tomatoes and other aromatic vegetables to create a rich and savory meal that is perfect for romantic evenings.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp maple syrup or agave nectar (optional)

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add olive oil. Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Add garlic and mushrooms, cook for another minute.
Stir in garam masala, lemon juice, nutritional yeast, maple syrup if using, cayenne pepper (if adding), and tomatoes. Bring to a simmer.
Pour the tomato mixture into an oven-safe dish, spread out evenly, and top with shredded vegan mozzarella cheese.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
